scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist/main/main.js dist/preload/preload.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run verify:backend-resource && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && node scripts/verify-backend-resource.cjs darwin && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build && node scripts/verify-backend-resource.cjs darwin && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --arm64
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build && node scripts/verify-backend-resource.cjs darwin && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --x64
